title: Reaver (disambiguation)
content:
'''Reaver''' was the name given to several starships:

*'''''[[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|Reaver]]''''', a [[Sabaoth Destroyer]] in [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]]
*'''''[[Reaver (Yuuzhan Vong)|Reaver]]''''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[frigate analog]]

{{Disambig}}
